import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    mut b = 0
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      b = v
    when None
      b = 32
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut num = 0
      mut done = false
      while not done
        if i >= n
          done = true
        else
          mut c = 32
          match string.byte_at(s, i)
          when Some(v)
            c = v
          when None
            c = 32
          end
          if c >= 48 and c <= 57
            num = num * 10 + (c - 48)
            i = i + 1
          else
            done = true
          end
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, num * sign)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  mut line1 = ""
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    line1 = s
  when None
    line1 = ""
  end
  mut line2 = ""
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    line2 = s
  when None
    line2 = ""
  end
  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  let trimmed = string.trim(line2)
  mut target = 0
  match string.parse_int(trimmed)
  when Some(v)
    target = v
  when None
    target = 0
  end
  match list.index_of(nums, target)
  when Some(idx)
    println("index=#{idx}")
  when None
    println("not_found")
  end
end
